Part.Source:
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2
//Header // &titulo = UPPER(&Title) // print Cabecalho //End
For Each Order EmpCod, DecCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where DecCod = &DecCod
&RazaoSocial = 'CORPORATE NAME: ' + trim(DecFilRaz) &Endereco = 'ADDRESS: ' + DecFilLogNro.Trim() + ' - ' + trim(DecFilBai) &Endereco2 = 'ZIP CODE: ' + trim(DecFilCep) + ' - ' + trim(DecFilCidNom) + ' - ' + trim(DecFilCidUfeCod) &CpfVar = 'CNPJ: ' + trim(DecFilCnpj) + ' STATE REGISTRATION: ' + trim(DecFilInsEst)
&FilImg146_50 = DecFilImg350_120
print DADOSFilial print Cabecalho
print tituloA
For Each Order EmpCod, DecCod, DecProNom &Ncm = trim(str(DecProNcmCod))
if DecDolMin > 0 and DecProVlr > 0 &moeda = round(DecProVlr / DecDolMin , 2) &MinValor = trim(toformattedString(&moeda)) Else &MinValor = '_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _' EndIF
if DecDolMax > 0 and DecProVlr > 0 &moeda = round(DecProVlr / DecDolMax, 2) &MaxValor = trim(toformattedString(&moeda)) Else &MaxValor = '_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _' EndIF
&auxDecProNom = trim(DecProRef)+' - '+trim(DecProNom)
&Qtd = gxMLines(&auxDecProNom, 50)
for &Count = 1 to &Qtd &Descricao = gxGetMLi(&auxDecProNom, &Count, 50) if &Count <> 1 &Ncm = '' &MinValor = '' &MaxValor = '' EndIF
print TituloProduto EndFor print linha EndFor
print espaco
print tituloDescricaoProcesso &PrcProCod = DecPrcProCod &DecProcProd = trim(DecProcProd) Do 'BuscaProcessoProdutivo'
&Qtd = gxMLines(&DecProcProd, 125) For &Count = 1 to &Qtd &ImprimirMensagem = GxGetMLi(&DecProcProd, &Count, 125) print DescricaoProcesso EndFor print espaco
print tituloElementos For Each Order EmpCod, DecCod, DecNcmItmCod if DecNcmCod <> 0 &Ncm = trim(str(DecNcmCod)) Else &Ncm = '_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _' EndIF
&Descricao = trim(DecNcmDes)
if DecNcmVlr <> 0 &Valor = trim(toformattedString(DecNcmVlr)) else &Valor = '_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _' EndIf
print Elementos EndFor print espaco
print TituloEstadosPartes For Each Order EmpCod, DecCod, DecMatItmCod &pais = trim(str(DecMatPaiCod)) &Ncm = trim(str(DecMatNcmCod)) &Valor = 'R$' + trim(ToformattedString(DecMatVlr)) &Percen = '' print partesEstados When none print printPrejudicado EndFor print espaco
print tituloTerceirosParte For Each Order EmpCod, DecCod, DecTerItmCod &pais = trim(str(DecTerPaiCod)) &Ncm = trim(str(DecTerNcmCod)) &Valor = 'R$' + trim(ToformattedString(DecTerVlr)) &Percen = '' print partesEstados When None print printPrejudicado EndFor print espaco
&Dia = day(DecDta) &MesNome = CMonth(DecDta, 'eng') &Ano = year(DecDta) &LocalData = DecFilCidNom.Trim() + ', ' + padL(str(&dia), 2, '0') + ' of ' + upper(&MesNome) + ' of ' + trim(Str(&Ano))
&AssPesCod = DecFunCod &NomeGerente = DecFunRaz &Gerente = DecFunFucNom
print Assinatura do 'GetAssinatrura' If not &PesRub.IsEmpty() print AssinaturaImagem Noskip EndIf print Assinatura2
Exit EndFor
Sub 'GetAssinatrura' &PesRub.SetEmpty() For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &AssPesCod &PesRub = PesRub Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'BuscaProcessoProdutivo' For Each ORder EmpCod, PrcProCod,PrcProNcmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PrcProCod = &PrcProCod
Do case CASE &IdiomaDeclaracao = 1 //PORTUGUES &DecProcProd += PrcProDesPtBr CASE &IdiomaDeclaracao = 2 //INGLES &DecProcProd += PrcProDesEnUs CASE &IdiomaDeclaracao = 3 //ESPANHOL &DecProcProd += PrcProDesEsES EndCase exit EndFor
EndSub
//Footer // print Rodape //End

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Product denomination for export and NCM or NALADI/SH position.

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Description of the production process (from raw materials to the final product to be exported)

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Demonstrative elements of the product components:

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Materials, components, and/or domestic parts and pieces.

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Materials, components, and/or parts and pieces originating from the States Parties.

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: (If nothing has been imported, indicate: DAMAGED within the chart)

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Materials, components, and/or parts and pieces originating from third countries.

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: (If nothing has been imported, indicate: DAMAGED within the chart)

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: legal penalties for omission or false information, as defined in Brazilian legislation.

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: We declare, for all relevant purposes, that the information contained in this document is true, subjecting ourselves to the

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão deste documento!
